caption: A news broadcast from News18 India discusses political developments in Bihar. The screens feature a red and white color scheme with the News18 India logo and a timestamp of "10:04 PM." Large Hindi text at the top reads "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" while a map of Bihar is centrally displayed. In the top frames, several headshots of men are visible on the left and right sides, including individuals labeled as "सब्रत चौधरी," "विजय सिन्हा," "संतोष सुक्खा," and "सुमित कुमार," with a man in a white kurta standing on the right. As the sequence progresses, the display shifts to show two men in white traditional clothing standing on opposite sides of the Bihar map. Large yellow text appearing over the map reads "JDU को धमकी." A bright yellow "BREAKING" banner emerges at the bottom of the screen in the final frames.
